name: io.github.dnotitia/akb
description: Git-backed org memory for AI agents — hybrid search, tables, files & a URI graph over MCP.

environmentVariables.name: AKB_MCP_URL
environmentVariables.description: Your AKB backend MCP endpoint, e.g. https://akb.example.com/mcp/ — or try the public demo at https://akb-demo.agent.seahorse.dnotitia.ai/mcp/

environmentVariables.name: AKB_PAT
environmentVariables.description: AKB Personal Access Token (akb_...). Create one in your AKB instance, or sign up on the public demo with any email to get one.
